subject: repository_ui_quarantine_cleanup
summary: UI cleanup generated multi-stage destructive mutation: basename collisions overwrote files; quarantine dir deletion removed untracked files; git checkout restored obsolete fake-green content; failed shell redirections created empty files. Historical recovery restored all 14 unavailable files; path-preserving quarantine + manifest v4 corrected design. Recovery does NOT erase the incident.
root_cause: recovery procedure not tested on fixtures

phase_a_interaction.note: Incident is orthogonal to Phase A soak; must not be used to fail or pass Phase A by implication

recommended_controls: inventory + hash before any destructive cleanup
never git-checkout as content recovery without explicit obsolete-content review
no shell redirect until source path validated non-empty
